name: TikTok Quick Tip
description: Fast-paced quick tip format for TikTok and short-form content

examples: This one trick will change how you [do something]
I wish I knew this sooner about [topic]

structure.description: Quickly establish the problem or question
structure.example: Most people struggle with [problem], but it doesn't have to be that way.

structure.description: Deliver the main content clearly and concisely
structure.format: Bullet points or quick steps work best
tips: Use on-screen text for key points
Keep it to 3 main points maximum

structure.description: Show the outcome or provide proof
examples: And here's what it looks like when you do it right...
Watch how much easier this becomes
Follow for more tips like this

TikTok: Post during peak hours (6-10 PM local time)
